---
title: General Transport
image: featured.jpg
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs 
  contents: ../../publications/publications_by_topic.yml
  sort: "date desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: "General Transport"

---
![](featured.jpg)

Transportation engineering and planning is a core area of our research. We conduct research across a wide range of topics in this area.

## Related Publications


:::{#pubs}
:::
